title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 229.450 - Sections applicable to certain counties — conflicting laws repealed
text:
229.450.  Sections applicable to certain counties — conflicting laws repealed. — Sections 229.420 to 229.450 shall apply only to counties operating under township organization.  All laws or parts of laws in conflict with the provisions of sections 229.420 to 229.450 are hereby repealed.
(RSMo 1939 § 8863) 
Prior revision: 1929 § 8203
